{{Quote|Stinger Velocity 200: A fast and deadly machine with enough missiles to go around|BlastBoast 2000 advertisement|<ref name="Enemies for Life">{{JournalCite|4|Enemies for Life}}</ref>}}
The '''Stinger Velocity 200''' was a modified velocity [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]]. It was equipped with a [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launcher and fired [[Minlet]] missiles. It was one of three permissible vehicles in the dangerous [[BlastBoast 2000]] race.<ref name="Enemies for Life" />

{{Ship-stub}}
